'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=NHMegBxn4oib0NoBJLW35N24KlpKoypunOU884VOr0I-1770801136-1.0.1.1-EDwj8Ux2qsOH5n7s8fYVjeLeA4E3OTXVcUN2cc8inPM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
